examples.title: Count lines containing a keyword
examples.description: Reads a text file line-by-line and counts how many lines contain a given substring.
examples.pseudocode:
input: path to file, keyword
set count to 0
open the file for reading (line-by-line)
for each line in the file:
  if line contains keyword:
    increment count
close the file
print count

examples.title: Copy file with line numbers
examples.description: Reads an input file and writes an output file where each line is prefixed with its line number.
examples.pseudocode:
input: inPath, outPath
open reader for inPath
open writer for outPath
lineNo = 1
for each line in reader:
  write lineNo + ": " + line to writer
  increment lineNo
close both files

examples.title: Sum a column from TSV (tab-separated values)
examples.description: Parses a TSV file and sums numeric values from a specified zero-based column index.
examples.pseudocode:
input: path to TSV file, columnIndex
sum = 0
open file for reading
for each line:
  split line by tab into fields
  if fields length > columnIndex:
    parse fields[columnIndex] as double
    add to sum
close file
print sum
